testcase.classname: Examples of cucumber data table implementation
testcase.name: list of fruits I like
testcase.system-out: Then user should see fruits I like..........................................passed

testcase.classname: Login feature of the library application
testcase.name: Login as librarian
testcase.system-out: Given user am on the home page of the application...........................passed When user enter the librarian username......................................passed And user enter the librarian password.......................................passed Then user should see the dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.classname: verification of new orders in the Cydeo Web Tables Program
testcase.name: Order Place Verification of Cydeo Web Tables Program
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in to web table app with the user name and password....passed When user enters Order page.................................................passed And user selects "MoneyCog" from Product dropdown menu......................passed And user enters "2" as quantity.............................................passed And user types "Muhtar Mahmoud" as Customer name............................passed And user enter "Third" to the Street field..................................passed And user enter "Arlington" as City name.....................................passed And user enters "VA" as State name..........................................passed And user enters "22202" as Zip code.........................................passed And user selects card type as "Visa"........................................passed And user enters Card number Card Number.....................................passed And user enters Expire Date "04/25".........................................passed And user clicks Process Order...............................................passed Then user should see new order in the table on View all orders page "Muhtar Mahmoud".passed

testcase.classname: Login feature of the web table application.
testcase.name: Login function of WebTable app
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the login page of Web table app............................passed When User enters below credentials..........................................passed Then User should see url contains "orders"..................................passed

testcase.classname: Login feature of the library application
testcase.name: Login as student
testcase.system-out: Given user am on the home page of the application...........................passed When user enter the student username........................................passed And user enter the student password.........................................passed Then user should see the dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.name: Login as admin
testcase.system-out: Given user am on the home page of the application...........................passed When user enter the admin username..........................................passed And user enter the admin password...........................................passed Then user should see the dashboard..........................................passed

testcase.classname: User should be able to see all 12 months in months dropdown
testcase.name: User should be able to see all 12 months in months dropdown
testcase.system-out: Given User is on the dropdowns page of practice tool........................passed Then User should be able to see below info in month dropdown................passed

testcase.name: Search page title verification
testcase.system-out: Given user is on Google search page.........................................passed Then user should see title is Google........................................passed

testcase.name: Title verification of wikipedia
testcase.system-out: Given User is on Wikipedia home page........................................passed When User types "Steve Jobs" in the wiki search box.........................passed And User clicks wiki search button..........................................passed Then User sees "Steve Jobs" is in the wiki title............................passed

testcase.classname: verification of new orders in the Cydeo Web Tables Program
testcase.name: Order Place Verification of Cydeo Web Tables Program - Example #1.1
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in to web table app with the user name and password....passed When user enters Order page.................................................passed And user selects "MoneyCog" from Product dropdown menu......................passed And user enters "2" as quantity.............................................passed And user types "Muhtar Mahmoud" as Customer name............................passed And user enter "Miller Street" to the Street field..........................passed And user enter "Arlington" as City name.....................................passed And user enters "VA" as State name..........................................passed And user enters "22202" as Zip code.........................................passed And user selects card type as "Visa"........................................passed And user enters Card number Card Number.....................................passed And user enters Expire Date "22/25".........................................passed And user clicks Process Order...............................................passed Then user should see new order in the table on View all orders page "Muhtar Mahmoud".passed

testcase.name: Wikipedia Search Functionality Header Verification
testcase.system-out: Given User is on Wikipedia home page........................................passed When User types "Steve Jobs" in the wiki search box.........................passed And User clicks wiki search button..........................................passed Then User sees "Steve Jobs" is in the main header...........................passed

testcase.classname: verification of new orders in the Cydeo Web Tables Program
testcase.name: Order Place Verification of Cydeo Web Tables Program - Example #1.2
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in to web table app with the user name and password....passed When user enters Order page.................................................passed And user selects "Familybea" from Product dropdown menu.....................passed And user enters "3" as quantity.............................................passed And user types "Adam" as Customer name......................................passed And user enter "Miller Street" to the Street field..........................passed And user enter "Arlington" as City name.....................................passed And user enters "VA" as State name..........................................passed And user enters "22203" as Zip code.........................................passed And user selects card type as "Visa"........................................passed And user enters Card number Card Number.....................................passed And user enters Expire Date "17/28".........................................passed And user clicks Process Order...............................................passed Then user should see new order in the table on View all orders page "Adam"..passed

testcase.classname: verification of new orders in the Cydeo Web Tables Program
testcase.name: Order Place Verification of Cydeo Web Tables Program - Example #1.3
testcase.system-out: Given user is logged in to web table app with the user name and password....passed When user enters Order page.................................................passed And user selects "MoneyCog" from Product dropdown menu......................passed And user enters "3" as quantity.............................................passed And user types "Erdogan" as Customer name...................................passed And user enter "South Ball" to the Street field.............................passed And user enter "Arlington" as City name.....................................passed And user enters "VA" as State name..........................................passed And user enters "22202" as Zip code.........................................passed And user selects card type as "MasterCard"..................................passed And user enters Card number Card Number.....................................passed And user enters Expire Date "19/29".........................................passed And user clicks Process Order...............................................passed Then user should see new order in the table on View all orders page "Erdogan".passed

testcase.system-out: Given User is on Wikipedia home page........................................passed When User types "Steve Jobs" in the wiki search box.........................passed And User clicks wiki search button..........................................passed Then User sees "Steve Jobs" is in the image header..........................passed
